name: ToolFi
description: Open API Marketplace for AI Agents. Pay-per-call crypto data tools with USDC on Base. No API keys, no accounts — just call and pay.

tools.name: Crypto Price Oracle
tools.description: Real-time cryptocurrency prices with 24h change, market cap, and liquidity. Supports 1000+ tokens across all major chains.

tools.name: Wallet Risk Scanner
tools.description: Analyze any EVM wallet for risk signals and transaction patterns. Checks transaction history, contract interactions, and known addresses.

tools.name: News Digest
tools.description: AI-curated crypto news with summaries from top sources. Filter by topic.

tools.name: Rug Pull Scanner
tools.description: Detect honeypots, hidden owners, tax mechanisms, and rug pull risks. Powered by GoPlus Security API.

tools.name: Bridge Router
tools.description: Find optimal cross-chain bridge routes. Aggregates 30+ bridges via Li.Fi for best rates and speed.

tools.name: DeFi Yield Finder
tools.description: Find top DeFi yields across all chains. Filter by APY, TVL, stablecoin pools. Powered by DefiLlama.

tools.name: Swap Router
tools.description: Find optimal swap routes across DEXs. Aggregates Uniswap, Sushiswap, Curve and more via Li.Fi.

tools.name: Trending Coins
tools.description: Get top trending cryptocurrencies right now. Real-time data from CoinGecko.

tools.name: Protocol TVL
tools.description: Get Total Value Locked data for DeFi protocols. Track TVL changes and compare protocols.

tools.name: Gas Tracker
tools.description: Real-time gas prices for Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum. Get safe, standard, and fast estimates.

paymentFlow.description: Call any endpoint → get 402 with payment instructions → pay on-chain → retry with X-Payment-Tx header
steps: 1. Call endpoint without payment → receive 402 Payment Required
